title: Petite Pickled Korean Vegetable Bibimbap
description: A floral and fluffy Korean dish from the Gangwon region, featuring cheese slices and pickles, perfect for a light and refreshing meal.

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as zucchini, carrots, and bell peppers

instructions: Prepare the mixed vegetables by slicing them into thin strips and setting them aside.
In a large pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the mixed vegetables, cooking until they are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to make the seasoning sauce.
Add the seasoning sauce to the pan with the vegetables and stir to combine.
In a separate pan, toast the sesame seeds over low heat, stirring frequently, until they are lightly browned.

To assemble the bibimbap, place a scoop of cooked white rice in the bottom of a bowl, followed by a portion of the vegetable mixture, some pickle slices, and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
Top the bibimbap with a slice of plant-based cheese and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
